//: Build config for the PUBLISHED package: same as tsconfig.json but omits test files + test-only support from the emitted dist/. Tests are still type-checked by `npm run typecheck` (which uses the base tsconfig.json that includes them) and run from source by vitest — they just don't ship in the npm tarball (DM-878). `src/test-support/**` holds test-only helpers (DM-1074) and is likewise kept out of dist.
